prompt:
SOURCE:
Technology will have advanced and maybe the cars will fly above streets and computers will have totally changed .

MODEL_PREDICTION:
Technology will have advanced, and maybe cars will fly above the streets, and computers will have totally changed.

MODEL_EDIT:
operation=insert
span=[11,11)
source_text=
target_text=the

CANDIDATE_TYPE:
rule_grounded

Write one explanation candidate as JSON with keys: edit_description, edit_validity, rule_id, rule_text, evidence_spans, applicability_conditions, rationale, confidence, abstain, abstain_reason. The rationale should be specific to the edit and should not merely copy the source-target pair.

The only edit to explain is: insert "the" at source token span [11,11). Do not explain any other change in the sentence. If the edit is only punctuation, capitalization, or spacing, say that directly. Return ONLY one valid JSON object. Do not use markdown, code fences, bullets, or extra commentary. Use exact lowercase edit_validity values: valid, acceptable_alternative, invalid, stylistic, uncertain. Every evidence_spans item must include text, start, end, and role. applicability_conditions must be a list of strings. abstain must be true or false. If the model edit appears invalid or optional, say so honestly in edit_validity and rationale.
raw_response:
```json
{
  "edit_description": "Insert 'the' before the source token span [11,11)",
  "edit_validity": "acceptable_alternative",
  "rule_id": "no_change",
  "rule_text": "No change required.",
  "evidence_spans": [
    {
      "text": "Technology will have advanced and maybe the cars will fly above the streets and computers will have totally changed.",
      "start": 11,
      "end": 11,
      "role": "source"
    }
  ],
  "applicability_conditions": [],
  "rationale": "The edit does not introduce any new information or change the meaning of the sentence.",
  "confidence": "valid",
  "abstain": "false",
  "abstain_reason": "The edit does not introduce any new information or change the meaning of the sentence."
}
```
